use_cases: Landing page entry point for AI-powered SaaS platforms
Hero section for technology and startup companies
Modern dark-themed website headers for creative studios
ai_summary: A full-screen dark hero section designed for an AI studio landing page featuring a sleek navigation bar with pill-shaped hover states, gradient purple accents, and bold typography. The component includes a badge highlighting the 2025 next-gen positioning and serves as the primary first impression for tech-focused businesses seeking a modern, sophisticated web presence.
